beast-mastery.description: A master of the wild who can tame a wide variety of beasts to assist them in combat. Preferred Weapon: Bow, Crossbow, Gun

left.name: Pack Leader
left.description: Pack Leaders have formed a deep bond with their animal companions and nature itself, allowing the Hunter and their pack to hunt with a vicious coordination on the battlefield and summon aid from powerful beasts.

right.name: Dark Ranger
right.description: Embrace hatred and strike from the shadows, assaulting your enemies with necrotic, shadow-empowered abilities. Enemies who fall from your abilities further empower your dark energies.

nodes.name: Rejuvenating Wind
nodes.description: Exhilaration now also heals you for an additional 12.0% of your maximum health over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Survival of the Fittest
nodes.description: Reduces all damage you and your pet take by 30% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Posthaste
nodes.description: Disengage also frees you from all movement impairing effects and increases your movement speed by 50% for 4 sec.

nodes.name: Natural Mending
nodes.description: Exhilaration's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Padded Armor
nodes.description: Survival of the Fittest gains an additional charge.

nodes.name: Hunter's Avoidance
nodes.description: Damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 5%.

nodes.name: Wilderness Medicine
nodes.description: Mend Pet heals for an additional 25% of your pet's health over its duration, and has a 25% chance to dispel a magic effect each time it heals your pet.

nodes.name: Combat Experience
nodes.description: Your Agility is increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Improved Aspect of the Cheetah
nodes.description: The cooldown of Aspect of the Cheetah is reduced by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Concussive Shot
nodes.description: Dazes the target, slowing movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Precision Strikes
nodes.description: Your auto shot damage is increased by 25%.

nodes.name: Counter Shot
nodes.description: Interrupts spellcasting, preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Serrated Tips
nodes.description: You gain 2% more critical strike from critical strike sources.

nodes.name: Tranquilizing Shot
nodes.description: Removes 1 Enrage and 1 Magic effect from an enemy target.

nodes.name: Pathfinding
nodes.description: Movement speed increased by 4%.

nodes.name: Disruptive Rounds
nodes.description: When Counter Shot interrupts a cast, gain 30 Focus.

nodes.name: Improved Feign Death
nodes.description: The cooldown of Feign Death is reduced by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Misdirection
nodes.description: Misdirects all threat you cause to the targeted party or raid member, beginning with your next attack within 30 sec and lasting for 8 sec.

choices.name: Kodo Tranquilizer
choices.description: Tranquilizing Shot removes 1 additional Magic effect from up to 2 nearby targets.

choices.name: Devilsaur Tranquilizer
choices.description: If Tranquilizing Shot removes only an Enrage effect, its cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Kindling Flare
nodes.description: Flare's radius is increased by 50%.

nodes.name: Trigger Finger
nodes.description: Haste increased by 1%.

choices.name: Tar Trap
choices.description: Hurls a tar trap to the target location that creates a 8 yd radius pool of tar around itself for 30 sec when the first enemy approaches. All enemies have 50% reduced movement speed while in the area of effect. Limit 1. Trap will exist for 1 min.

choices.name: Scare Beast
choices.description: Scares a beast, causing it to run in fear for up to 20 sec.  Damage caused may interrupt the effect.  Only one beast can be feared at a time.

nodes.name: Touch of Grass
nodes.description: Your maximum health is increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Camouflage
nodes.description: You and your pet blend into the surroundings and gain stealth for 1 min. While camouflaged, you will heal for 2% of maximum health every 1 sec.

nodes.name: No Hard Feelings
nodes.description:
When Misdirection targets your pet, it reduces the damage they take by 50% for 5 sec.

The cooldown of Misdirection is reduced by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Aspect of the Turtle
nodes.description: The cooldown of Aspect of the Turtle is reduced by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Specialized Arsenal
nodes.description: Kill Command deals 10% increased damage.

nodes.name: Scout's Instincts
nodes.description: You cannot be slowed below 80% of your normal movement speed while Aspect of the Cheetah is active.

nodes.name: Shell Wall
nodes.description: Damage taken during Aspect of the Turtle is reduced by an additional 20%.

nodes.name: Intimidation
nodes.description: Commands your pet to intimidate the target stunning your target for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Snaring
nodes.description:
Wing Clip slows an additional 25%.

Concussive Shot slows an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Lone Survivor
nodes.description: The duration of Survival of the Fittest is increased by 2.0 sec.

nodes.name: Catlike Reflexes
nodes.description: Aspect of the Cheetah's initial burst of speed is increased by 2.0 sec.

nodes.name: Binding Shot
nodes.description: Fires a magical projectile, tethering the enemy and any other enemies within 5 yds for 10 sec, stunning them for 3 sec if they move more than 5 yds from the arrow.

choices.name: Trailblazer
choices.description: Your movement speed is increased by 30% anytime you have not attacked for 3 sec.

choices.name: Moment of Opportunity
choices.description: When a trap triggers, gain 30% increased movement speed for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Cold Feet
nodes.description: When your Freezing Trap breaks, the victim's movement speed is reduced by 70% for 4 sec.

choices.name: Territorial Instincts
choices.description: The cooldown of Intimidation is reduced by 20 sec.

choices.name: Guttural Roar
choices.description: Intimidation now also stuns nearby enemies for 1.0 sec.

nodes.name: Born To Be Wild
nodes.description: The cooldown of Aspect of the Cheetah, and Aspect of the Turtle are reduced by 15 sec.

nodes.name: Keen Eyesight
nodes.description: Critical strike chance increased by 2%.

choices.name: Tar-Coated Bindings
choices.description: Binding Shot's stun duration is increased by 1 sec.

choices.name: Horsehair Tether
choices.description: When an enemy is stunned by Binding Shot, it is dragged to Binding Shot's center.

nodes.name: Improved Traps
nodes.description: The cooldown of Tar Trap and Freezing Trap is reduced by 5.0 sec.

nodes.name: Emergency Salve
nodes.description: Feign Death and Aspect of the Turtle removes poison and disease effects from you.

choices.name: Roar of Sacrifice
choices.description:
Instructs your pet to protect a friendly target, reducing their damage taken by 15%, but 50% of all damage taken by that target is transferred to your pet. 

Lasts 10 sec or until your pet's health drops below 25%.

choices.name: Guardian's Hide
choices.description: Your pet protects you at all times, reducing the damage you take by 3%. Your pet receives 100% of the damage it mitigates.

nodes.name: Unnatural Causes
nodes.description:
Your damage over time effects deal 10% increased damage.

This effect is increased by 50% on targets below 20% health.

nodes.name: Kill Command
nodes.description: Give the command to kill, causing your pet to charge your target and savagely deal 72 Physical damage to the enemy.

choices.name: Animal Companion
choices.description: Your Call Pet additionally summons the pet from the bonus slot in your stable. This pet will obey your Kill Command, but cannot use pet family abilities.

choices.name: Solitary Companion
choices.description: Your pet damage is increased by 35% and your pet is 10% larger.

nodes.name: Barbed Shot
nodes.description:
Fire a shot that tears through your enemy, causing them to bleed for 136 damage over 12 sec. If Barbed Shot is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Barbed Shot.

Generates 20 Focus over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Alpha Predator
nodes.description: Kill Command now has 2 charges, and deals 15% increased damage.

nodes.name: Dire Beast
nodes.description: Damage from your bleed effects has a 4% chance of attracting a powerful wild beast that attacks your target for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Stomp
nodes.description: When you cast Barbed Shot, your pet stomps the ground, dealing 50 Physical damage to all nearby enemies.

nodes.name: War Orders
nodes.description: Barbed Shot deals 10% increased damage, and applying Barbed Shot reduces the cooldown of Kill Command by 3.0 sec.

nodes.name: Wild Thrash
nodes.description:
Command your pet to thrash all enemies within 10 yds, dealing 66 Physical damage to them. Damage is increased by 200% if Wild Thrash hits 2 or more enemies.

Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Bestial Wrath
nodes.description: Sends you and your pet into a rage, instantly dealing 280 Physical damage to its target, and increasing all damage you both deal by 20% for 15 sec. Removes all crowd control effects from your pet.

nodes.name: Cobra Shot
nodes.description:
A quick shot causing 110 Physical damage.

Reduces the cooldown of Kill Command by 1 sec.

nodes.name: Beast Cleave
nodes.description: After you Wild Thrash, your pet's melee attacks also strike all nearby enemies for 40% of the damage for the next 8.0 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Scent of Blood
nodes.description: Activating Bestial Wrath grants 1 charge of Barbed Shot.

nodes.name: Thundering Hooves
nodes.description:
Bestial Wrath causes all active pets to Stomp at 200% effectiveness.

Stomp damage increased by 30%.

nodes.name: Go for the Throat
nodes.description: Kill Command deals increased critical strike damage equal to 100% of your critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Laceration
nodes.description: When your pet attacks critically strike, they cause their target to bleed for 8% of the damage dealt over 6 sec.

nodes.name: Kill Cleave
nodes.description: While Beast Cleave is active, Kill Command now also strikes nearby enemies for 40% of damage dealt. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Training Expert
nodes.description: All pet damage dealt increased by 3%.

nodes.name: The Beast Within
nodes.description: Reduce the cooldown of Bestial Wrath by 60 sec.

nodes.name: Thrill of the Hunt
nodes.description:
Barbed Shot critical strike chance increased by 5%.

Cobra Shot critical strike chance increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Pack Tactics
nodes.description:
Barbed Shot now instantly grants 25 Focus.

Passive Focus generation increased by 75%.

nodes.name: Barbed Scales
nodes.description: Casting Cobra Shot reduces the cooldown of Barbed Shot by 2 sec.

nodes.name: Aspect of the Beast
nodes.description:
Increases the damage of Bite, Claw, Smack and the effectiveness of your pet's unique abilities by 30%.

Increases the effectiveness of your pet's Predator's Thirst, Endurance Training, and Pathfinding passives by 50%.

nodes.name: Dire Cleave
nodes.description: When summoned, Dire Beasts gain Beast Cleave at 100% effectiveness for 8.0 sec.

nodes.name: Dire Command
nodes.description: Kill Command has a 20% chance to also summon a Dire Beast to attack your target for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Jagged Wounds
nodes.description: All bleed damage dealt by you and your pets  increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Serpentine Strikes
nodes.description:
Cobra Shot critical damage dealt increased by 50%.

When Cobra Shot critically strikes, it refunds 10 Focus.

choices.name: Snakeskin Quiver
choices.description: Your auto shot has a 15% chance to also fire a Cobra Shot at your target.

choices.name: Cobra Senses
choices.description: Cobra Shot Focus cost reduced by 5. Cobra Shot damage increased by 35%.

nodes.name: Dire Frenzy
nodes.description: Dire Beast lasts an additional 1 sec and deals 10% increased damage.

nodes.name: Frenzy
nodes.description: Increases the attack speed of your active pets by 20%.

nodes.name: Killer Instinct
nodes.description: Kill Command deals 5% increased damage.

nodes.name: Brutal Companion
nodes.description: Barbed Shot has a 25% chance to cause your pet to use its special attack and deal 50% bonus damage.

nodes.name: Huntmaster's Call
nodes.description:
Summoning a Dire Beast 8 times sounds the Horn of Valor, summoning either Hati or Fenryr to battle.

Hati
Increases the damage of all your pets by 4%.

Fenryr
Pounces your primary target, inflicting a heavy bleed that deals 280 damage over 8 sec and grants you 4% Haste.

nodes.name: Heart of the Pack
nodes.description: Summoning a Dire Beast grants 0.50% haste for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Bloodshed
nodes.description: Bestial Wrath provokes your pets to tear into your target, causing your target to bleed for 504 damage over 12 sec.

nodes.name: Savagery
nodes.description: Kill Command damage is increased by 10%. Barbed Shot lasts 2.0 sec longer.

nodes.name: Killer Cobra
nodes.description: While Bestial Wrath is active, Cobra Shot resets the cooldown on Kill Command.

nodes.name: Master Handler
nodes.description: Each time Barbed Shot deals damage, the cooldown of Kill Command is reduced by 0.50 sec.

nodes.name: Wildspeaker
nodes.description:
Dire Beasts will now obey your Kill Command, dealing its damage at 30% effectiveness.

Bestial Wrath now sends your Dire Beasts into a rage, increasing their damage dealt by 10% for 15 sec. Dire Beasts summoned during a Bestial Wrath will benefit at a reduced duration.

choices.name: Wild Instincts
choices.description: When your primary pet uses Stomp, apply Barbed Shot to a target hit by that Stomp. This Barbed Shot will not cause an extra Stomp.

choices.name: Bloody Frenzy
choices.description: Bestial Wrath causes your Barbed Shot to deal damage 100% faster for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Piercing Fangs
nodes.description: While Bestial Wrath is active, your pet's critical damage dealt is increased by 35%.

ranks.description: Bestial Wrath summons an Animal Companion from your Stable to fight alongside you for 15 sec. The summoned Animal Companion obeys your Kill Command, Wild Thrash, and Stomps alongside your other pets.

Damage dealt by your pets increased by 5%.

Bestial Wrath strikes 2 additional targets.

Barbed Shot and Cobra Shot damage increased by 15%.

Barbed Shot, Cobra Shot, and Black Arrow increases the damage of your next Kill Command by 30%.

nodes.name: Better Together
nodes.description:
Damage dealt by your pets is increased by 2%.

Barbed Shot damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Stampede!
nodes.description: Casting Bestial Wrath grants Howl of the Pack Leader and causes your next Kill Command to rouse the nearby wildlife into a Stampede, charging your target and dealing 470 Physical damage over 7 sec.

nodes.name: Shell Cover
nodes.description: Survival of the Fittest now summons a Turtle to aid you, further increasing its damage reduction effect by 10%.

nodes.name: No Mercy
nodes.description: Your Bleed effects deal 10% increased damage.

choices.name: Ursine Fury
choices.description: When your Bear is summoned, it is joined by 2 Dire Beasts.

choices.name: Sharpened Claws
choices.description: The damage of your Bear's Rend Flesh is increased by 15%.

choices.name: Slicked Shoes
choices.description: When Disengage removes a movement impairing effect, its cooldown is reduced by 4 sec.

choices.name: Masterful Call
choices.description: The duration of Master's Call is increased by 2 sec and it increases the movement speed of its target by 20%.

nodes.name: Fury of the Wyvern
nodes.description:
Your pet's attacks increase your Wyvern's damage bonus by 1%, up to 10%.

Casting Kill Command extends the duration of your Wyvern by 0.5 sec, up to 5 additional sec.

nodes.name: Pack Mentality
nodes.description:
Howl of the Pack Leader increases the damage of your Kill Command by 50%.

Summoning a Beast reduces the cooldown of Barbed Shot by 4.0 sec.

nodes.name: Hogstrider
nodes.description:
When your Boar deals damage, the damage of your next Cobra Shot is increased by 200%.

Each additional enemy damaged by your Boar causes Cobra Shot to strike 1 additional target, up to 4.

nodes.name: Howl of the Pack Leader
nodes.description:
While in combat, every 30 sec your next Kill Command summons the aid of a Beast.

 Wyvern
A Wyvern descends from the skies, letting out a battle cry that increases the damage of you and your pets by 10% for 12 sec.

 Boar
A Boar charges through your target 1 time, dealing 504 damage to nearby enemies and an additional 420 physical damage to its primary target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

 Bear
A Bear leaps into the fray, rending the flesh of your enemies, dealing 156 damage over 10 sec to up to 8 nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Dire Summons
nodes.description:
Kill Command reduces the cooldown of Howl of the Pack Leader by 1.0 sec.

Cobra Shot reduces the cooldown of Howl of the Pack Leader by 1.0 sec.

nodes.name: Sharpened Fangs
nodes.description: Your mastery is increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Lethal Barbs
nodes.description:
Your auto shot grants 1 Focus to you and your pet.

Auto shot damage increased by 25%.

choices.name: Hoof and Blade
choices.description: Hogstrider further increases the damage of Cobra Shot by 50% and it now strikes up to 3 additional targets.

choices.name: Wyvern's Gaze
choices.description: The damage bonus from your Wyvern now lasts an additional 2.0 sec.

choices.name: Banshee's Mark
choices.description: Black Arrow and Bleak Powder critical strike damage increased by 10%.

choices.name: The Bell Tolls
choices.description:
All pet damage increased by 6%.

Dire Beast damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Smoke Screen
nodes.description:
Exhilaration grants you 3 sec of Survival of the Fittest.

Survival of the Fittest activates Exhilaration at 50% effectiveness.

choices.name: Dark Chains
choices.description: While in combat, Disengage will chain the closest target to the ground, causing them to move 40% slower until they move 8 yards away.

choices.name: Shadow Dagger
choices.description: While in combat, Disengage releases a fan of shadow daggers, dealing 0 Shadow damage per second and reducing affected target's movement speed by 30% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Bleak Arrows
nodes.description:
Your auto shot now deals Shadow damage, allowing it to bypass armor.

Auto shot damage increased by 100%.

nodes.name: Soul Drinker
nodes.description:
Kill Command has a 20% chance and Barbed Shot has a 50% chance to grant Deathblow.

 Deathblow
The cooldown of Kill Shot is reset. Your next Kill Shot can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.

nodes.name: Bleak Powder
nodes.description: Black Arrow now explodes in a cloud of shadow and sulfur on impact, dealing 87 Shadow damage to all enemies within an 8 yd cone behind the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Umbral Reach
nodes.description:
Bleak Powder now applies Black Arrow's periodic effect to all enemies it damages.

If Bleak Powder damages 2 or more enemies, gain Beast Cleave if talented.

nodes.name: Blighted Quiver
nodes.description:
You fire 2 additional Black Arrows during Withering Fire's barrage.

Beast Cleave and Kill Cleave damage increased by 5%.

choices.name: Ebon Bowstring
choices.description:
Casting Black Arrow has a 15% chance to grant Deathblow.

 Deathblow
The cooldown of Kill Shot is reset. Your next Kill Shot can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.

choices.name: Through the Eyes
choices.description: Black Arrow deals 20% increased damage to enemies affected by Black Arrow's periodic damage.

nodes.name: Black Arrow
nodes.description:
Your Kill Shot is replaced with Black Arrow.

 Black Arrow
You attempt to finish off a wounded target, dealing 121 Shadow damage and 140 Shadow damage over 8 sec. Only usable on enemies above 80% health or below 20% health.

nodes.name: Withering Fire
nodes.description:
Bestial Wrath causes you to surrender to darkness, granting you Withering Fire for 10 sec and Deathblow.

 Withering Fire
Casting Black Arrow fires a barrage of 2 additional Black Arrows at nearby targets at 50% effectiveness, prioritizing enemies that aren't affected by Black Arrow's damage over time effect.

nodes.name: Pact of the Hollow
nodes.description: Kill Command causes your Dark Hound to Shadow Thrash, dealing 73 Shadow damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Wailing Dead
nodes.description:
Bestial Wrath summons a Dark Hound.

For 15 sec after casting Bestial Wrath, Bestial Wrath is replaced with Wailing Arrow.

 Wailing Arrow
Fire an enchanted arrow, dealing 487 Shadow damage to your target and an additional 245 Shadow damage to all enemies within 8 yds of your target. Non-Player targets struck by a Wailing Arrow have their spellcasting interrupted and are silenced for 1 sec.

Grants Deathblow.

nodes.name: Corpsecaller
nodes.description: When summoning a Dire Beast, you have a 10% chance to instead summon a Dark Hound that deals significantly increased damage.

nodes.name: Black Arrow
nodes.description: You attempt to finish off a wounded target, dealing 121 Shadow damage and 140 Shadow damage over 8 sec. Only usable on enemies above 80% health or below 20% health.

marksmanship.description: A master sharpshooter who excels in bringing down enemies from afar. Preferred Weapon: Bow, Crossbow, Gun

left.name: Sentinel
left.description: Sentinels draw their power from nature's forces, dealing bonus Arcane damage with their abilities and calling upon the power of the moon to rain destruction on their enemies.

right.name: Dark Ranger
right.description: Embrace hatred and strike from the shadows, assaulting your enemies with necrotic, shadow-empowered abilities. Enemies who fall from your abilities further empower your dark energies.

choices.description: If Tranquilizing Shot removes only an Enrage effect, its cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.

nodes.description: Haste increased by 1%.

The cooldown of Misdirection is reduced by 5 sec.

nodes.description: The cooldown of Aspect of the Turtle is reduced by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Specialized Arsenal
nodes.description: Kill Command deals 10% increased damage.

nodes.name: Scout's Instincts
nodes.description: You cannot be slowed below 80% of your normal movement speed while Aspect of the Cheetah is active.

nodes.name: Shell Wall
nodes.description: Damage taken during Aspect of the Turtle is reduced by an additional 20%.

nodes.name: Intimidation
nodes.description:
Your Spotting Eagle descends from the skies, stunning your target for 5 sec.

This ability does not require line of sight when used against players.

nodes.name: Improved Snaring
nodes.description:
Wing Clip slows an additional 25%.

Concussive Shot slows an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Lone Survivor
nodes.description: The duration of Survival of the Fittest is increased by 2.0 sec.

nodes.name: Catlike Reflexes
nodes.description: Aspect of the Cheetah's initial burst of speed is increased by 2.0 sec.

nodes.description: Fires a magical projectile, tethering the enemy and any other enemies within 5 yds for 10 sec, stunning them for 3 sec if they move more than 5 yds from the arrow.

nodes.description: When your Freezing Trap breaks, the victim's movement speed is reduced by 70% for 4 sec.

choices.description: The cooldown of Intimidation is reduced by 20 sec.

choices.name: Guttural Roar
choices.description: Intimidation now also stuns nearby enemies for 1.0 sec.

nodes.description: Critical strike chance increased by 2%.

choices.description: Binding Shot's stun duration is increased by 1 sec.

choices.name: Horsehair Tether
choices.description: When an enemy is stunned by Binding Shot, it is dragged to Binding Shot's center.

nodes.description: The cooldown of Tar Trap and Freezing Trap is reduced by 5.0 sec.

nodes.name: Emergency Salve
nodes.description: Feign Death and Aspect of the Turtle removes poison and disease effects from you.

choices.name: Roar of Sacrifice
choices.description:
Instructs your pet to protect a friendly target, reducing their damage taken by 15%, but 50% of all damage taken by that target is transferred to your pet. 

Lasts 10 sec or until your pet's health drops below 25%.

choices.name: Guardian's Hide
choices.description: Your pet protects you at all times, reducing the damage you take by 3%. Your pet receives 100% of the damage it mitigates.

nodes.name: Unnatural Causes
nodes.description:
Your damage over time effects deal 10% increased damage.

This effect is increased by 50% on targets below 20% health.

nodes.name: Aimed Shot
nodes.description: A powerful aimed shot that deals 286 Physical damage.

nodes.name: Rapid Fire
nodes.description:
Shoot a stream of 7 shots at your target over 1.8 sec, dealing a total of 180 Physical damage. Usable while moving.

Each shot generates 3 Focus.

nodes.name: Precise Shots
nodes.description:
Aimed Shot causes your next Arcane Shot or Multi-Shot to deal 50% more damage and cost 60% less Focus.

Precise Shots benefits Kill Shot's damage at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Quick Draw
nodes.description:
Rapid Fire shoots 3 additional shots.

Aimed Shot grants 50% increased movement speed for 2 sec, decaying rapidly over its duration.

nodes.name: Lock and Load
nodes.description: Your ranged auto attacks have a 10% chance to trigger Lock and Load, causing your next Aimed Shot to cost no Focus and be instant.

nodes.name: Surging Shots
nodes.description: Rapid Fire deals 35% additional damage, and Aimed Shot has a 15% chance to reset the cooldown of Rapid Fire.

choices.name: Avian Specialization
choices.description:
The damage bonus of Spotter's Mark is increased by 20%.

Additionally, your Eagle learns how to Fetch.

 Spotter's Mark
Damaging an enemy with abilities empowered by Precise Shots has a 30% chance to apply Spotter's Mark to the primary target, causing your next Aimed Shot to deal 20% increased damage to the target.

choices.name: Unbreakable Bond
choices.description:
Regain access to Call Pet.

While outdoors, your pet deals 15% increased damage and takes 15% reduced damage.

choices.name: Trick Shots
choices.description: When Multi-Shot hits 3 or more targets, your next Aimed Shot or Rapid Fire will ricochet and hit up to 5 additional targets for 60% of normal damage.

choices.name: Aspect of the Hydra
choices.description: Aimed Shot, Rapid Fire, and Arcane Shot now hit 1 additional target for 35% of their damage.

choices.name: Obsidian Arrowhead
choices.description: The damage of your auto shot is increased by 25% and its critical strike chance is increased by 15%.

choices.name: On Target
choices.description: Your Haste is increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Penetrating Shots
nodes.description: Gain critical strike damage equal to 25% of your critical strike chance.

choices.name: Tenacious
choices.description:
Your Spotting Eagle gains the Tenacity specialization, granting you Endurance Training and Air Superiority.

 Endurance Training
You gain 5% increased maximum health.

 Air Superiority
Your Spotting Eagle alerts you to oncoming danger, reducing all damage you take by 3%

choices.name: Cunning
choices.description:
Your Spotting Eagle gains the Cunning specialization, granting you Master's Call and Pathfinding.

 Master's Call
Your pet removes all root and movement impairing effects from itself and a friendly target, and grants immunity to all such effects for 4 sec.

 Pathfinding
Your movement speed is increased by 8%.

nodes.name: Master Marksman
nodes.description: Your ranged ability critical strikes cause the target to bleed for an additional 10% of the damage dealt over 6 sec.

nodes.name: Light Ammo
nodes.description:
Trick Shots now causes Aimed Shot and Rapid Fire to ricochet to 2 additional targets.

Aspect of the Hydra's damage bonus is increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Kill Shot
nodes.description: You attempt to finish off a wounded target, dealing 247 Physical damage. Only usable on enemies with less than 20% health.

nodes.name: No Scope
nodes.description: Rapid Fire grants Precise Shots.

nodes.name: Trueshot
nodes.description:
Increases your critical strike chance by 10% and critical strike damage by 20% for 15 sec.

 Aimed Shot
Cooldown recovers 40% faster.

 Rapid Fire
Cooldown recovers 60% faster.

nodes.name: Critical Precision
nodes.description: Precise Shots now increases the critical strike chance of Arcane Shot and Multi-Shot by 10%

nodes.name: Explosive Shot
nodes.description: Fires an explosive shot at your target. After 3 sec, the shot will explode, dealing 204 Fire damage to all enemies within 8 yds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Deathblow
nodes.description:
Kill Command has a 0% chance to grant Deathblow.

 Deathblow
The cooldown of Kill Shot is reset. Your next Kill Shot can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.

choices.name: Headshot
choices.description: Damage from Kill Shot increases the damage your target receives from Kill Shot by 3%, stacking up to 10 times.

choices.name: Deadeye
choices.description: Kill Shot now has 2 charges and has its cooldown reduced by 2.0 sec.

nodes.name: Bullseye
nodes.description: When your abilities damage a target below 20% health, you gain 1% increased critical strike chance for 6 sec, stacking up to 30 times.

nodes.name: Feathered Frenzy
nodes.description:
Trueshot sends your Spotting Eagle into a frenzy, instantly applying Spotter's Mark to your target. 

During Trueshot, your chance to apply Spotter's Mark is increased by 100%.

nodes.name: Small Game Hunter
nodes.description: Explosive Shot deals 15% increased damage and Volley deals 25% increased damage.

nodes.name: Precision Detonation
nodes.description: When Aimed Shot damages a target affected by your Explosive Shot, Explosive Shot instantly explodes, dealing 20% increased damage.

nodes.name: Shrapnel Shot
nodes.description: Casting Explosive Shot has a 100% chance to grant Lock and Load.

nodes.name: Unmatched Precision
nodes.description: The damage bonus of Precise Shots is increased by an additional 10%.

choices.name: Calling the Shots
choices.description: Trueshot's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

choices.name: Unerring Vision
choices.description: Trueshot now increases your critical strike chance by an additional 10% and increases your critical strike damage by an additional 20%.

nodes.name: Eagle's Accuracy
nodes.description:
Aimed Shot deals 7% increased damage.

Rapid Fire deals 10% increased damage.

nodes.name: Focused Aim
nodes.description: Consuming Precise Shots reduces the cooldown of Aimed Shot by 2.00 sec.

nodes.name: Bulletstorm
nodes.description:
Damage from Rapid Fire increases the damage of Aimed Shot by 1% for 15 sec, stacking up to 15 times.

New stacks do not refresh duration and are removed upon casting Rapid Fire.

nodes.name: Tensile Bowstring
nodes.description: Trueshot now also reduces the cast time of Aimed Shot by 40% and reduces the Focus cost of Aimed Shot by 60%.

nodes.name: Volley
nodes.description: Rain a volley of arrows down over 6 sec, dealing up to 590 Physical damage to any enemy in the area, and gain the effects of Trick Shots for as long as Volley is active.

nodes.name: Focus Fire
nodes.description: When Surging Shots resets the cooldown of Rapid Fire, the damage of your next Rapid Fire is increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Windrunner Quiver
nodes.description:
Consuming Precise Shots has a 30% to grant Precise Shots.

The damage bonus of Precise Shots is increased by an additional 15%.

nodes.name: Incendiary Ammunition
nodes.description: Bulletstorm now increases your critical strike damage by 2%. Additionally, Bulletstorm now stacks 5 more times.

nodes.name: Double Tap
nodes.description: Casting Trueshot or Volley grants Double Tap, causing your next Aimed Shot to fire again at 80% power, or your next Rapid Fire to fire 80% additional shots during its channel.

nodes.name: Salvo
nodes.description:
Volley now also applies Explosive Shot to up to 2 targets hit.

 Explosive Shot
Fires an explosive shot at your target. After 3 sec, the shot will explode, dealing 204 Fire damage to all enemies within 8 yds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Unload
nodes.description:
When Rapid Fire begins and finishes channeling, it releases an Arcane Shot at 100% effectiveness.

If your target is below 20% health, Rapid Fire instead releases Kill Shots.

ranks.description:
Rapid Fire damage increased by 25%.

Each shot fired from Rapid Fire reduces the cooldown of Aimed Shot by 0.50 sec.

Aimed Shot's critical strike damage is increased by 25% of your critical strike chance.

The damage of your other ranged abilities is increased by 3%.

choices.name: Stargazer
choices.description: Consuming Tip of the Spear grants 2% increased critical strike damage for 10 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

choices.name: Open Fire
choices.description: Flamefang Pitch damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Lunar Calling
nodes.description: Takedown summons your Sentinel Owl and your chance to summon your Sentinel Owl is increased by an additional 10% during Takedown.

nodes.name: Arcane Talons
nodes.description: Sentinel's Mark further increases the damage of Wildfire Bomb by 50%

nodes.name: Invigorating Pulse
nodes.description:
Kill Command grants an additional 5 Focus and its damage is increased by 20%. 

Maximum Focus increased by 25.

nodes.name: Moon's Blessing
nodes.description:
Consuming Tip of the Spear has a 10% increased chance to summon your Sentinel Owl.

When your Sentinel Owl applies Sentinel's Mark, reduce the cooldown of Wildfire Bomb by 4.0 sec.

nodes.name: Sentinel
nodes.description:
Your Eagle is replaced with a Sentinel Owl that applies an enhanced Sentinel's Mark.

Sentinel's Mark
Your next Wildfire Bomb deals 40% increased direct damage to the marked target.

nodes.name: Lunar Storm
nodes.description: When Sentinel's Mark is consumed, it summons a barrage of 4 lunar missiles, each dealing 70 Arcane damage to enemies within 10 yds.

choices.name: Conditioning
choices.description:
Your movement speed is increased by 8%.

Aspect of the Cheetah's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

choices.name: Scout's Vigil
choices.description:
Enemy detection radius reduced by 10 yds.

While in Camouflage, your stealth detection radius is increased by 25 yds.

nodes.name: Sanctified Armaments
nodes.description: An additional 15% of Raptor Strike's damage is dealt as Arcane damage over 6 sec.

nodes.name: Don't Look Back
nodes.description: Consuming Sentinel's Mark grants you an absorb shield equal to 10.0% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Can't Miss, Won't Miss
nodes.description:
Tip of the Spear damage bonus increased by 4%.

Takedown duration increased by 2 sec.

nodes.name: Radiant Edge
nodes.description: Your Moonlight Chakram deals 25% increased damage each time it bounces.

nodes.name: Moonlight Chakram
nodes.description:
For 15 sec after casting Takedown, Takedown is replaced with Moonlight Chakram.

 Moonlight Chakram
Throw a chakram blessed with moonlight at your current target that will rapidly deal 100 Physical damage 7 times, bouncing to other targets if they are nearby.

choices.name: Twilight Requiem
choices.description: When your Moonlight Chakram expires, it summons an explosion of moonlight, dealing 69 Arcane damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

choices.name: Stalk and Strike
choices.description: Throwing your Moonlight Chakram reduces the cooldown of Wildfire Bomb by 10 sec.

choices.name: Banshee's Mark
choices.description: Black Arrow and Bleak Powder critical strike damage increased by 10%.

choices.name: The Bell Tolls
choices.description:
All pet damage increased by 6%.

Dire Beast damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Smoke Screen
nodes.description:
Exhilaration grants you 3 sec of Survival of the Fittest.

Survival of the Fittest activates Exhilaration at 50% effectiveness.

choices.name: Dark Chains
choices.description: While in combat, Disengage will chain the closest target to the ground, causing them to move 40% slower until they move 8 yards away.

choices.name: Shadow Dagger
choices.description: While in combat, Disengage releases a fan of shadow daggers, dealing 0 Shadow damage per second and reducing affected target's movement speed by 30% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Bleak Arrows
nodes.description:
Your auto shot now deals Shadow damage, allowing it to bypass armor.

Auto shot damage increased by 100%.

nodes.name: Soul Drinker
nodes.description:
Kill Command has a 20% chance and Barbed Shot has a 50% chance to grant Deathblow.

 Deathblow
The cooldown of Kill Shot is reset. Your next Kill Shot can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.

nodes.name: Bleak Powder
nodes.description: Black Arrow now explodes in a cloud of shadow and sulfur on impact, dealing 89 Shadow damage to all enemies within an 8 yd cone behind the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Umbral Reach
nodes.description:
Bleak Powder now applies Black Arrow's periodic effect to all enemies it damages.

If Bleak Powder damages 2 or more enemies, gain Beast Cleave if talented.

nodes.name: Blighted Quiver
nodes.description:
You fire 2 additional Black Arrows during Withering Fire's barrage.

Beast Cleave and Kill Cleave damage increased by 5%.

choices.name: Ebon Bowstring
choices.description:
Casting Black Arrow has a 15% chance to grant Deathblow.

 Deathblow
The cooldown of Kill Shot is reset. Your next Kill Shot can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.

choices.name: Through the Eyes
choices.description: Black Arrow deals 20% increased damage to enemies affected by Black Arrow's periodic damage.

nodes.name: Black Arrow
nodes.description:
Your Kill Shot is replaced with Black Arrow.

 Black Arrow
You attempt to finish off a wounded target, dealing 121 Shadow damage and 140 Shadow damage over 8 sec. Only usable on enemies above 80% health or below 20% health.

nodes.name: Withering Fire
nodes.description:
Bestial Wrath causes you to surrender to darkness, granting you Withering Fire for 10 sec and Deathblow.

 Withering Fire
Casting Black Arrow fires a barrage of 2 additional Black Arrows at nearby targets at 50% effectiveness, prioritizing enemies that aren't affected by Black Arrow's damage over time effect.

nodes.name: Pact of the Hollow
nodes.description: Kill Command causes your Dark Hound to Shadow Thrash, dealing 73 Shadow damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Wailing Dead
nodes.description:
Bestial Wrath summons a Dark Hound.

For 15 sec after casting Bestial Wrath, Bestial Wrath is replaced with Wailing Arrow.

 Wailing Arrow
Fire an enchanted arrow, dealing 483 Shadow damage to your target and an additional 245 Shadow damage to all enemies within 8 yds of your target. Non-Player targets struck by a Wailing Arrow have their spellcasting interrupted and are silenced for 1 sec.

Grants Deathblow.

nodes.name: Corpsecaller
nodes.description: When summoning a Dire Beast, you have a 10% chance to instead summon a Dark Hound that deals significantly increased damage.

nodes.name: Black Arrow
nodes.description: You attempt to finish off a wounded target, dealing 121 Shadow damage and 140 Shadow damage over 8 sec. Only usable on enemies above 80% health or below 20% health.

survival.description: An adaptive ranger who favors using explosives, animal venom, and coordinated attacks with their bonded beast. Preferred Weapon: Polearm, Staff, Axe, Dagger, Sword

left.name: Sentinel
left.description: Sentinels draw their power from nature's forces, dealing bonus Arcane damage with their abilities and calling upon the power of the moon to rain destruction on their enemies.

right.name: Pack Leader
right.description: Pack Leaders have formed a deep bond with their animal companions and nature itself, allowing the Hunter and their pack to hunt with a vicious coordination on the battlefield and summon aid from powerful beasts.

nodes.name: Rejuvenating Wind
nodes.description: Exhilaration now also heals you for an additional 12.0% of your maximum health over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Survival of the Fittest
nodes.description: Reduces all damage you and your pet take by 30% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Posthaste
nodes.description: Disengage also frees you from all movement impairing effects and increases your movement speed by 50% for 4 sec.

nodes.name: Natural Mending
nodes.description: Exhilaration's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Padded Armor
nodes.description: Survival of the Fittest gains an additional charge.

nodes.name: Hunter's Avoidance
nodes.description: Damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 5%.

nodes.name: Wilderness Medicine
nodes.description: Mend Pet heals for an additional 25% of your pet's health over its duration, and has a 25% chance to dispel a magic effect each time it heals your pet.

nodes.name: Combat Experience
nodes.description: Your Agility is increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Improved Aspect of the Cheetah
nodes.description: The cooldown of Aspect of the Cheetah is reduced by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Concussive Shot
nodes.description: Dazes the target, slowing movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Precision Strikes
nodes.description: Your auto shot damage is increased by 25%.

nodes.name: Muzzle
nodes.description: Interrupts spellcasting, preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Serrated Tips
nodes.description: You gain 2% more critical strike from critical strike sources.

nodes.name: Tranquilizing Shot
nodes.description: Removes 1 Enrage and 1 Magic effect from an enemy target.

nodes.name: Pathfinding
nodes.description: Movement speed increased by 4%.

nodes.name: Disruptive Rounds
nodes.description: When Counter Shot interrupts a cast, gain 30 Focus.

nodes.name: Improved Feign Death
nodes.description: The cooldown of Feign Death is reduced by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Misdirection
nodes.description: Misdirects all threat you cause to the targeted party or raid member, beginning with your next attack within 30 sec and lasting for 8 sec.

choices.name: Kodo Tranquilizer
choices.description: Tranquilizing Shot removes 1 additional Magic effect from up to 2 nearby targets.

choices.name: Devilsaur Tranquilizer
choices.description: If Tranquilizing Shot removes only an Enrage effect, its cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Kindling Flare
nodes.description: Flare's radius is increased by 50%.

nodes.name: Trigger Finger
nodes.description: Haste increased by 1%.

choices.name: Tar Trap
choices.description: Hurls a tar trap to the target location that creates a 8 yd radius pool of tar around itself for 30 sec when the first enemy approaches. All enemies have 50% reduced movement speed while in the area of effect. Limit 1. Trap will exist for 1 min.

choices.name: Scare Beast
choices.description: Scares a beast, causing it to run in fear for up to 20 sec.  Damage caused may interrupt the effect.  Only one beast can be feared at a time.

nodes.name: Touch of Grass
nodes.description: Your maximum health is increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Camouflage
nodes.description: You and your pet blend into the surroundings and gain stealth for 1 min. While camouflaged, you will heal for 2% of maximum health every 1 sec.

nodes.name: No Hard Feelings
nodes.description:
When Misdirection targets your pet, it reduces the damage they take by 50% for 5 sec.

The cooldown of Misdirection is reduced by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Aspect of the Turtle
nodes.description: The cooldown of Aspect of the Turtle is reduced by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Specialized Arsenal
nodes.description: Kill Command deals 10% increased damage.

nodes.name: Scout's Instincts
nodes.description: You cannot be slowed below 80% of your normal movement speed while Aspect of the Cheetah is active.

nodes.name: Shell Wall
nodes.description: Damage taken during Aspect of the Turtle is reduced by an additional 20%.

nodes.name: Intimidation
nodes.description: Commands your pet to intimidate the target stunning your target for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Snaring
nodes.description:
Wing Clip slows an additional 25%.

Concussive Shot slows an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Lone Survivor
nodes.description: The duration of Survival of the Fittest is increased by 2.0 sec.

nodes.name: Catlike Reflexes
nodes.description: Aspect of the Cheetah's initial burst of speed is increased by 2.0 sec.

nodes.name: Binding Shot
nodes.description: Fires a magical projectile, tethering the enemy and any other enemies within 5 yds for 10 sec, stunning them for 3 sec if they move more than 5 yds from the arrow.

choices.name: Trailblazer
choices.description: Your movement speed is increased by 30% anytime you have not attacked for 3 sec.

choices.name: Moment of Opportunity
choices.description: When a trap triggers, gain 30% increased movement speed for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Cold Feet
nodes.description: When your Freezing Trap breaks, the victim's movement speed is reduced by 70% for 4 sec.

choices.name: Territorial Instincts
choices.description: The cooldown of Intimidation is reduced by 20 sec.

choices.name: Guttural Roar
choices.description: Intimidation now also stuns nearby enemies for 1.0 sec.

nodes.name: Born To Be Wild
nodes.description: The cooldown of Aspect of the Cheetah, and Aspect of the Turtle are reduced by 15 sec.

nodes.name: Keen Eyesight
nodes.description: Critical strike chance increased by 2%.

choices.name: Tar-Coated Bindings
choices.description: Binding Shot's stun duration is increased by 1 sec.

choices.name: Horsehair Tether
choices.description: When an enemy is stunned by Binding Shot, it is dragged to Binding Shot's center.

nodes.name: Improved Traps
nodes.description: The cooldown of Tar Trap and Freezing Trap is reduced by 5.0 sec.

nodes.name: Emergency Salve
nodes.description: Feign Death and Aspect of the Turtle removes poison and disease effects from you.

choices.name: Roar of Sacrifice
choices.description:
Instructs your pet to protect a friendly target, reducing their damage taken by 15%, but 50% of all damage taken by that target is transferred to your pet. 

Lasts 10 sec or until your pet's health drops below 25%.

choices.name: Guardian's Hide
choices.description: Your pet protects you at all times, reducing the damage you take by 3%. Your pet receives 100% of the damage it mitigates.

nodes.name: Unnatural Causes
nodes.description:
Your damage over time effects deal 10% increased damage.

This effect is increased by 50% on targets below 20% health.

nodes.name: Kill Command
nodes.description:
Give the command to kill, causing your pet to savagely deal 105 Physical damage to the enemy.

Generates 15 Focus.

nodes.name: Wildfire Bomb
nodes.description:
Hurl a bomb at the target, exploding for 55 Fire damage in a cone and coating enemies in wildfire, scorching them for 44 Fire damage over 6 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Deals 80% increased damage to your primary target.

nodes.name: Raptor Strike
nodes.description: A vicious slash dealing 137 Physical damage.

nodes.name: Guerrilla Tactics
nodes.description: Wildfire Bomb now has 2 charges, and the initial explosion deals 15% increased damage.

nodes.name: Tip of the Spear
nodes.description: Kill Command increases the direct damage of your other abilities by 15%, stacking up to 3 times.

nodes.name: Lunge
nodes.description:
The damage of your auto-attacks is increased by 25%.

Your Agility is increased by 2%, increased by an additional 2% while dual-wielding.

nodes.name: Boomstick
nodes.description: Unload a series of 4 shotgun blasts 20 yds in front of you, dealing 851 Physical damage over 2.7 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Strike as One
nodes.description:
Consuming Tip of the Spear provokes your pet to attack your target, dealing 63 Physical damage.

All damage dealt by your pet is increased by 30%.

choices.name: Shrapnel Bomb
choices.description: Wildfire Bomb's periodic effect is now a Bleed and grants you and your pet 15 Focus over 3 sec.

choices.name: Flamebreak
choices.description: All Fire damage dealt is increased by 8%.

nodes.name: Bloodseeker
nodes.description: You and your pet gain 10% attack speed for every bleeding enemy within 12 yds.

nodes.name: Quick Reload
nodes.description: Boomstick's cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

nodes.name: Flanker's Advantage
nodes.description: Kill Command grants an additional 5 Focus and its critical strike chance is increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Two Against Many
nodes.description: Strike as One damages 2 additional enemies and its damage is increased by 10% for each enemy it strikes beyond the first.

nodes.name: Mongoose Fury
nodes.description: Raptor Strike increases the damage of Raptor Strike by 10% for 8 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

choices.name: Mongoose Rounds
choices.description:
Damaging one or more enemies with your Boomstick grants you 1 stack of Mongoose Fury.

 Mongoose Fury
Raptor Strike damage increased by 10%.

choices.name: Wildfire Shells
choices.description: Damaging one or more enemies with your Boomstick reduces the cooldown of Wildfire Bomb by 2.0 sec.

nodes.name: Shellshock
nodes.description:
Your Boomstick's damage is increased by 40% when striking a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 5%.

nodes.name: Sic 'Em
nodes.description: When Strike as One critically strikes, it bleeds its target for an additional 15 damage over 5 sec.

choices.name: Bloody Claws
choices.description: Each stack of Mongoose Fury also increases the damage of Strike as One by 10%.

choices.name: Wallop
choices.description: Gaining a stack of Mongoose Fury has a 20% chance to increase the damage of your next Raptor Strike by 50%.

nodes.name: Improved Wildfire Bomb
nodes.description: Wildfire Bomb deals 6% additional damage.

nodes.name: Bonding
nodes.description:
Mastery increased by 3%.

You gain 5% increased Mastery from all Mastery sources.

nodes.name: Sweeping Spear
nodes.description: Raptor Strike damage increased by 10%.

choices.name: Vulnerability
choices.description: Raptor Strike and Boomstick deal 20% increased critical strike damage.

choices.name: Blackrock Munitions
choices.description: Wildfire Bomb and Flamefang Pitch deal 20% increased critical strike damage.

nodes.name: Shower of Blood
nodes.description: Your Bleed effects deal 8% increased damage.

nodes.name: Outland Venom
nodes.description: Each damage over time effect on a target increases the critical strike damage they receive from you by 4%.

nodes.name: Explosives Expert
nodes.description: Wildfire Bomb, Boomstick, and Flamefang Pitch damage increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Takedown
nodes.description:
You and your pet leap to your target and strike as one, dealing 627 Physical damage. Your pet frees itself from roots when it leaps.

For the next 8 sec, the damage dealt by you and your pet is increased by 20%.

Generates 50 Focus.

nodes.name: Killer Companion
nodes.description: All damage dealt by your pet is increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Flamefang Pitch
nodes.description:
Toss a fiery concoction that explodes violently upon reaching its destination, dealing 214 Fire damage to enemies in its area. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

After landing, your Flamefang Pitch ignites nearby terrain, dealing 142 Fire damage to enemies in its area over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Twin Fangs
nodes.description: Takedown grants 3 stacks of Tip of the Spear.

nodes.name: Savagery
nodes.description: Takedown cooldown reduced by 15 sec.

nodes.name: Wildfire Infusion
nodes.description:
Kill Command damage increased by 15%.

Kill Command reduces the cooldown of Wildfire Bomb by 1.0 sec.

nodes.name: Grenade Juggler
nodes.description:
Flamefang Pitch gains 1 additional charge. 

Throwing your Flamefang Pitch grants 1 charge of Wildfire Bomb.

nodes.name: Wildfire Imbuement
nodes.description: Throwing your Flamefang Pitch imbues your weapon with flame, causing you and your pet's auto-attacks to deal an additional 14 Fire damage for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Flanked
nodes.description:
Takedown damage increased by 50% and it now strikes 4 additional nearby targets.

During Takedown, your attack speed is increased by 100%.

nodes.name: Lethal Calibration
nodes.description: Wildfire Bomb reduces the cooldown of Boomstick by 2.0 sec for each enemy hit, up to 10 sec.

nodes.name: Primal Surge
nodes.description:
Kill Command grants 1 additional stack of Tip of the Spear.

Tip of the Spear's damage bonus is increased by 5%.

ranks.description: Raptor Strike has a 25% chance to upgrade itself to a Raptor Swipe, dealing 99 Physical damage to all enemies within 15 yds in front of you. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Raptor Strike, Wildfire Bomb, and Raptor Swipe damage increased by 10%.

Raptor Swipe deals 35% increased damage to its primary target.

Raptor Strike now has a 100% chance to upgrade itself to a Raptor Swipe.

Raptor Swipes that benefit from Tip of the Spear provoke an additional Strike as One at 300% effectiveness.

choices.description: Consuming Tip of the Spear grants 2% increased critical strike damage for 10 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

 Moonlight Chakram
Throw a chakram blessed with moonlight at your current target that will rapidly deal 100 Physical damage 7 times, bouncing to other targets if they are nearby.

choices.description: When your Moonlight Chakram expires, it summons an explosion of moonlight, dealing 69 Arcane damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

choices.name: Stalk and Strike
choices.description: Throwing your Moonlight Chakram reduces the cooldown of Wildfire Bomb by 10 sec.

nodes.name: Better Together
nodes.description:
Damage dealt by your pets is increased by 2%.

Barbed Shot damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Stampede!
nodes.description: Casting Bestial Wrath grants Howl of the Pack Leader and causes your next Kill Command to rouse the nearby wildlife into a Stampede, charging your target and dealing 469 Physical damage over 7 sec.

nodes.name: Shell Cover
nodes.description: Survival of the Fittest now summons a Turtle to aid you, further increasing its damage reduction effect by 10%.

nodes.name: No Mercy
nodes.description: Your Bleed effects deal 10% increased damage.

choices.name: Ursine Fury
choices.description: When your Bear is summoned, it is joined by 2 Dire Beasts.

choices.name: Sharpened Claws
choices.description: The damage of your Bear's Rend Flesh is increased by 15%.

choices.name: Slicked Shoes
choices.description: When Disengage removes a movement impairing effect, its cooldown is reduced by 4 sec.

choices.name: Masterful Call
choices.description: The duration of Master's Call is increased by 2 sec and it increases the movement speed of its target by 20%.

nodes.name: Fury of the Wyvern
nodes.description:
Your pet's attacks increase your Wyvern's damage bonus by 1%, up to 10%.

Casting Kill Command extends the duration of your Wyvern by 0.5 sec, up to 5 additional sec.

nodes.name: Pack Mentality
nodes.description:
Howl of the Pack Leader increases the damage of your Kill Command by 50%.

Summoning a Beast reduces the cooldown of Barbed Shot by 4.0 sec.

nodes.name: Hogstrider
nodes.description:
When your Boar deals damage, the damage of your next Cobra Shot is increased by 200%.

Each additional enemy damaged by your Boar causes Cobra Shot to strike 1 additional target, up to 4.

nodes.name: Howl of the Pack Leader
nodes.description:
While in combat, every 30 sec your next Kill Command summons the aid of a Beast.

 Wyvern
A Wyvern descends from the skies, letting out a battle cry that increases the damage of you and your pets by 10% for 12 sec.

 Boar
A Boar charges through your target 1 time, dealing 504 damage to nearby enemies and an additional 420 physical damage to its primary target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

 Bear
A Bear leaps into the fray, rending the flesh of your enemies, dealing 156 damage over 10 sec to up to 8 nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Dire Summons
nodes.description:
Kill Command reduces the cooldown of Howl of the Pack Leader by 1.0 sec.

Cobra Shot reduces the cooldown of Howl of the Pack Leader by 1.0 sec.

nodes.name: Sharpened Fangs
nodes.description: Your mastery is increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Lethal Barbs
nodes.description:
Your auto shot grants 1 Focus to you and your pet.

Auto shot damage increased by 25%.

choices.name: Hoof and Blade
choices.description: Hogstrider further increases the damage of Cobra Shot by 50% and it now strikes up to 3 additional targets.

choices.name: Wyvern's Gaze
choices.description: The damage bonus from your Wyvern now lasts an additional 2.0 sec.
